prompt:
Move cluster logic out of vault package

Specifically: move HeartbeatInterval from github.com/hashicorp/vault/vault to github.com/hashicorp/vault/vault/cluster; move clusterListenerAcceptDeadline from github.com/hashicorp/vault/vault to github.com/hashicorp/vault/vault/cluster renaming it to ListenerAcceptDeadline; move ClusterClient from github.com/hashicorp/vault/vault to github.com/hashicorp/vault/vault/cluster renaming it to Client; move ClusterHandler from github.com/hashicorp/vault/vault to github.com/hashicorp/vault/vault/cluster renaming it to Handler
